ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager assigned to the store */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the store location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the store location */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the store was opened */,
  "last_renovation_date" TEXT /* Date when the store was last renovated */,
  "store_size" INTEGER /* Size of the store in square feet */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of the store (e.g., flagship, outlet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the department is located */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_category" TEXT /* Category of the department (e.g., Electronics, Clothing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "floor" TEXT /* Floor on which the department is located */,
  "department_size" INTEGER /* Size of the department in square feet */,
  "staff_count" INTEGER /* Number of staff in the department */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the sales occurred */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the sales occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the week for which sales are recorded */,
  "weekly_sales" REAL /* Total sales for the week */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the week included a holiday */,
  "daily_sales" REAL /* Daily sales for the week */,
  "customer_count" INTEGER /* Number of customers each week */,
  "average_transaction_value" REAL /* Average value of each transaction */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the promotion related to the sales */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data related to the sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_promotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("promotion_id") REFERENCES promotions ("promotion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the holiday */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* Type of the holiday (e.g., national, local) */,
  "holiday_notes" TEXT /* Notes or special instructions related to the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store the manager is assigned to */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager left the company (if applicable) */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the manager */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the promotion is active */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department where the promotion is active */,
  "promotion_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "promotion_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered during the promotion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the promotion is currently active */,
  "promotion_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the promotion */,
  "promotion_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the promotion */,
  "promotion_effectiveness_score" REAL /* Effectiveness score of the promotion based on sales data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the weather data is recorded */,
  "weather_date" TEXT /* Date for which the weather data is recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature on the date */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation on the date */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed on the date */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity on the date */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in miles */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
